About Us

Beyond Ordinary
IT Solutions.

FTFX TECH SOLUTIONS specializes in professional Data Recovery services including HDD Recovery, SSD Recovery, Memory Card Recovery, Photo Recovery, Pen Drive Recovery and Password Recovery.

We also provide complete IT Support including Computer Repair, Laptop Repair, Windows & macOS Support, Virus Removal, Slow PC Optimization and Website Design & Development.

Our Mission Focus

Reliable
Professional
Secure
Fast
Premium

Why Choose Us

We combine industry-leading technology with unparalleled expertise to deliver exceptional results.

Data Security

Enterprise-grade security protocols to protect your sensitive information.

Professional Engineers

Certified experts with decades of combined experience in data recovery.

Latest Technology

State-of-the-art cleanroom facilities and advanced recovery tools.

Affordable Pricing

Transparent, competitive pricing with no hidden charges.

Fast Turnaround

Expedited services available for critical data emergencies.

Customer Satisfaction

A proven track record of successful recoveries and happy clients.

Advanced Diagnostics

Precise identification of hardware and software failures.

Premium Support

24/7 dedicated support team ready to assist you anytime.

Our Proven Process

A transparent, step-by-step approach ensuring the highest success rate in data recovery.

Diagnosis

Comprehensive analysis of your media to determine the exact cause of failure.

Recovery

Advanced techniques in our certified cleanroom to safely extract your data.

Verification

Strict quality control checks to ensure complete data integrity.

Delivery

Secure transfer of your recovered data on a new, encrypted storage device.

Supported Technologies

We work with all major platforms, file systems, and hardware configurations.

macOS
Linux
Android

APFS
BitLocker

Node
